posts.author: BiancaKruys (Bianca Kruys)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Requesting a View plus Comment license tier in order to give Viewers the option to add comments into the Update section without having to assign them a full license.

What are you trying to achieve

Improve communication and decrease emails with our internal stakeholders who issue requests to a board via a form, but are not able to add or reply to any of the updates.
